name: Toonerville
description: Toonerville Rifa 13 (TVR) is a Chicano street gang based in Atwater Village, Los Angeles, with approximately 450 members. Named after the area's resemblance to the 'Toonerville Folks' cartoon due to the red line trolley. Mexican Mafia-affiliated Sureño gang. Member Timothy Joseph McGhee was sentenced to death in 2009 for three homicides and suspected in up to twelve murders. Rivals with Armenian Power, The Avenues, Vineland Boys, and MS-13. Has expanded to Glendale and Gwinnett County, Georgia. In 2008, LA and Glendale sought a gang injunction against them.
